name: Admin Auth Cognito
description: Enables AWS Cognito OAuth sign-in provider.

settingsFields.label: Cognito Client ID
settingsFields.helpText: Optional DB override. If set with Client Secret and Issuer, this overrides AUTH_COGNITO_ID.

settingsFields.label: Cognito Client Secret
settingsFields.helpText: Optional DB override. If set with Client ID and Issuer, this overrides AUTH_COGNITO_SECRET.

settingsFields.label: Cognito Issuer URL
settingsFields.helpText: Optional DB override. Must be the full Cognito issuer URL.
